title: NYC Yellow Taxi Demand Analysis
description: Exploratory analysis of 2023 NYC Yellow Taxi trips to optimize fleet deployment, pricing, zone positioning, and customer experience.
insights: Identified 3 PM as the strongest demand hour and Friday as the busiest day.
Found trip distance to be the strongest fare predictor with correlation of 0.87.
Highlighted Midtown as the dominant pickup zone and night trips as high-value revenue contributors.
